What I'm best at

The problems I gravitate toward: multi-role systems, data-dense dashboards, complex workflows that serve 10+ user types. I reduce complexity without removing capability.

Enterprise SaaSMulti-step workflows, admin tools, reporting
Data VisualizationDashboards, analytics, compliance reporting
Design SystemsComponent libraries, tokens, documentation
Product StrategyResearch, prioritization, outcome framing
(03)

How I work

"Stanley's Reports redesign turned our most-complained-about feature into the one customers started requesting in demos."

Michael Gugel Co-Founder & CPO, GoCo

I work best when I'm close to engineering and have direct access to user data. I don't design in isolation — I sit in sprint planning, review analytics, and make trade-off calls with PMs. My best work comes from long-term product ownership, not handoff-heavy processes.

(04)

Beyond the product

I mentor 30+ early-career designers through portfolio reviews, mock interviews, and career strategy sessions. I've also led product design workshops for 100+ students — breaking down how to move from visual output to outcome-driven thinking.

Let's build something
that works.

Open to senior product design roles in enterprise SaaS and complex B2B products.
